ul.li: Linear: Result of high volume or slow consumers. Resolution: Scale workers.
Exponential: Result of unprocessable messages. Resolution: Fix downstream bug.
DEGRADED: Service functional but requires engineer attention.
UNHEALTHY: Service state corrupt; restart initiated by Orchestrator.

g.text: HEALTHY | 200 OK | Traffic: ALLOW | Action: None
DEGRADED | 200 OK | Traffic: ALLOW | Action: PagerAlert
UNHEALTHY | 503 ERR | Traffic: DENY | Action: RestartPod
Warning: DLQ depth exceeding linear threshold
